column9: Cairo__________the capital of Egypt. It______________on the banks on the Nile River. (BE/STAND)
column10: The River Seine____________through the centre of Paris. (FLOW)
column12: She__________the salad,____________it on the table and____________aside. (BRING/PUT/STEP)
column13: "___________the princess____________this way?" he asked. "Yes", said the people. "She_____________this way only ten minutes ago." (PASS/PASS)
column14: A pronoun is any word that___________a noun in a sentence. (REPLACE)
column15: You use the past continuous tense to talk about something that____________and________________yet. (HAPPEN/NOT FINISH)
column17: He was angry. He______________the letter and___________it in the bin. (TAKE/THROW)
column20: The Amazon River basin__________at the heart of South America. (LIE)
column21: A mammoth is an animal that____________a long time ago but no longer_________ . (LIVE/EXIST)
